mother witnesses the passing away of a daughter.
From the age of 54-55 the native V.:ill improve financially a great deal
and perform marriages etc., during that period. About 58-59 he may go to
foreign countries. He may have losses in his 60th year--but there will be
happiness. From 61 to 70 he will have a very propitious time-He will enjoy
peace of mind and have conveyance etc. His wife will be ill at 69-70 but live
uptb 73. He will live upto 74-75.
CHART 42
Jupiter representing the life
Moon forces has planets in both the previous
and next houses. The native has
Sun brothers and sisters as Jupiter is in
Dh.
Mer. Capricorn with Ketu. In between
Saturn and Jupiter there is Mars.
Jupt
Hence, one of his brothers will have
Ven.
Dt short life. The native will have some
profits from his brothers. Mars is Lord
Mars Sat.
of the 4th and the 11th from Jupiter.
Hence, there will be accrual of money
through the brother.
